children.heading: Nature and venue
children.label: a Nature and venue
children.text: The proceedings to enforce such forfeitures shall be in the nature of a proceeding in rem in the United States District Court for the district where such seizure is made.

children.heading: Service of process when property has been returned under bond
children.label: b Service of process when property has been returned under bond
children.text: In case bond as provided in section 7324(3) shall have been executed and the property returned before seizure thereof by virtue of process in the proceedings in rem authorized in subsection (a) of this section, the marshal shall give notice of pendency of proceedings in court to the parties executing said bond, by personal service or publication, and in such manner and form as the court may direct, and the court shall thereupon have jurisdiction of said matter and parties in the same manner as if such property had been seized by virtue of the process aforesaid.

children.heading: Cost of seizure taxable
children.label: c Cost of seizure taxable
children.text: The cost of seizure made before process issues shall be taxable by the court.
